title: The Samurai’s Body Parts Appear
description: On pages 8–11, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the samurai’s body parts appear.
scene: The scene focuses on the samurai’s body parts appear, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's not in very good taste.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: O!! You guys, get over here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's all snowy... NO, ice-covered mountains!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What kind of island is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The victims of the murderous Samuel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Aghhh!! Did you see that?! just now...!!

summary: The Samurai’s Body Parts Appear. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
